text:
On Sat, Mar 04, 2000 at 12:03:09PM -0800, Arun Sharma wrote:
> >Description:
> 
> 	make install on the Zope port fails because CHMOD is not defined.

Update your ports collection.

<2 5013-0> (00-03-04 15:25:43) [will@shadow /usr/ports/Mk]% grep chmod
bsd.port.mk
CHMOD?=         /bin/chmod

-- 
Will Andrews <andrews@technologist.com>
